explanation: The user requests to get a pot and wash it. First, I pick up the pot (using pot_0 as the object since no other pot is referenced in the state). I then place it in the sink basin to wash it. To wash the pot, I turn on and off the faucet to simulate the washing process. After washing, I pick up the pot again and place it back on the countertop. This sequence ensures the pot is obtained and properly washed as requested.
